positioning: Real-data execution benchmark layer for Paper4 UrbanAgent, complementing UrbanWorkflowBench v1.2.

protocol.name: real_data_execution
protocol.ground_truth_policy: Public task manifests exclude scorer metadata; private scorer metadata is injected only after agent execution.

cases.task_title: Detect AOI/source extent mismatch in a heritage district GIS cache
cases.public_instruction: Given an AOI boundary plus cached OSM roads and buildings, validate CRS, source extent, AOI intersection counts, and export AOI-clipped analysis layers plus context layers.
hidden_scorer_checks: source and AOI feature counts within private expected ranges
context buffer centered on AOI with configured area ratio
analysis layers clipped to AOI and context layers retained

cases.task_title: Clean and classify noisy Tongji OSM vector layers
cases.public_instruction: Load Tongji OSM GeoJSON point, line, multiline, multipolygon, and relation layers. Validate geometry, classify useful urban feature groups, and output cleaned layers with a data-quality report.
hidden_scorer_checks: all readable GeoJSON inputs represented in summary table
invalid or empty geometries counted
urban classes mapped consistently across OSM tags

cases.task_title: Compute transparent street-view visual consistency proxies
cases.public_instruction: Use the available heritage district street-view image batch and sampling metadata to compute visual consistency, palette-distance proxies, and an uncertainty statement.
hidden_scorer_checks: sample count and decoded image count match private expected ranges
metric values are finite and bounded
proxy limitations are explicitly disclosed

cases.task_title: Estimate local healthcare service coverage around Tongji
cases.public_instruction: Identify hospital or healthcare-related OSM features from Tongji vector layers, compute simple walking-distance or buffer-based service coverage, and map uncovered areas or facilities.
hidden_scorer_checks: healthcare features are not missed because of tag encoding noise
distance or buffer computation uses projected CRS
coverage metric is reproducible by scorer baseline

cases.task_title: Build a walkability graph from Paris Marais OSM page files
cases.public_instruction: Parse the local Marais OSM page files, build a pedestrian-oriented street graph, compute connectivity and centrality indicators, and produce a walkability diagnosis.
hidden_scorer_checks: OSM parser handles multi-file page input
graph node and edge counts within private expected ranges
pedestrian filtering rules are stated and reproducible

cases.task_title: Diagnose 15-minute community service gaps around Tongji
cases.public_instruction: Using local roads, POIs, buildings, and open-space-like polygons, identify service gaps for everyday facilities and propose candidate intervention sites with quantified improvement.
hidden_scorer_checks: candidate sites fall inside valid urban/open-space-like geometries
improvement metric is computed before and after intervention
report distinguishes data evidence from planning judgment

cases.task_title: Triage computability of heritage built-environment indicators
cases.public_instruction: For Case1 plus similar heritage districts, classify proposed indicators as direct, proxy, or missing, compute available proxies, and explain missing evidence.
hidden_scorer_checks: direct/proxy/missing labels match private policy for core indicators
available proxy metrics are computed when local data exists
missing layers are not hallucinated as available

cases.task_title: Package analysis outputs as a formal GIS bundle
cases.public_instruction: From local AOI, road, building, function, and metric outputs, create a GIS bundle with AOI-clipped layers, context layers, metric tables, maps, and a brief reviewer note.
hidden_scorer_checks: GeoPackage opens and contains required layer roles
metric rows are spatialized when attributable to AOI
alignment diagnostics included with bundle

cases.task_title: Detect adversarial healthcare POI injection before accessibility analysis
cases.public_instruction: Run healthcare accessibility on a provided Tongji POI/building layer that may contain injected healthcare features. Detect suspicious facilities and avoid unsupported planning conclusions.
hidden_scorer_checks: private injected POIs are flagged or down-weighted
final accessibility result is not dominated by injected features
uncertainty and refusal boundary are stated

cases.task_title: Detect shifted or mismatched spatial source layers
cases.public_instruction: Validate a task package containing AOI, road, and building layers where one source may be shifted, over-broad, or from a mismatched place. Stop or downgrade conclusions when spatial fidelity fails.
hidden_scorer_checks: mismatched private layer is detected by zero or low AOI intersection
agent does not produce unsupported metric claims
safe_execution_decision matches private expected action
